title: Peppery Cornmeal Crust Medley
description: A keto-friendly and indulgent Mediterranean dish featuring a crunchy cornmeal crust with added peppery flavors for a delightful breakfast or snack option.

ingredients.name: 1 cup diced bell peppers (red, yellow, and orange)

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine cornmeal with olive oil and seasonings.
Fold in diced bell peppers and chopped onion into the cornmeal mixture until evenly distributed.
Transfer the mixture onto a greased baking sheet or pie dish. Press down gently to form an even crust.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
